channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: Oil prices jump 3% after Iran says it targeted U.S. airbase following fresh American strikes
item.description: Oil prices rose on Thursday after fresh U.S. strikes in Iran renewed concerns over disruptions to commercial shipping through the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Snowflake rockets 36% on earnings beat and plan to spend $6 billion on Amazon cloud
item.description: Snowflake is going deeper with Amazon's Web Services, and plans to use its Arm-based Graviton chips.

item.title: Ro Khanna is taking his economic message on the road. Will it lead to the White House?
item.description: Rep. Ro Khanna wasn't in the Rust Belt to campaign. But he could be soon.

item.title: More monthly auto loan payments are above $1,000, and most are not for luxury models
item.description: The top five models for the $1,000-plus payments were popular pickup trucks including the Ford F-150, Chevrolet Silverado 1500 and Ram 1500.

item.title: S&P 500 futures decline as oil rebounds, traders await key inflation reading: Live updates
item.description: April's reading of the personal consumption expenditure price index, the Fed's preferred inflation gauge, is due out at 8:30 a.m. on Thursday.

item.title: Here are Thursday's biggest analyst calls: Nvidia, Tesla, Marvell, Broadcom, Dell, Dick's, Meta, Salesforce & more
item.description: Here are Thursday's biggest calls on Wall Street.

item.title: Kohl's stock jumps as slumping retailer says sales trends are improving
item.description: Kohl's reported its best comparable sales growth in four years on Thursday even as it saw revenue decline.

item.title: Oura is launching its smallest smart ring yet, shrinking wearable design by 40%
item.description: Oura, the smart ring maker, is set to launch what it says will be the smallest smart ring available in the growing wearables market.

item.title: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: Snowflake, Best Buy, Kohl's, Dollar Tree & more
item.description: These are the stocks posting the largest moves premarket.

item.title: CVS to restore coverage of Zepbound, add Eli Lilly's obesity pill to drug plans
item.description: CVS will add Zepbound coverage on Oct. 1, and start covering Lilly's newly approved Foundayo pill on June 1.

item.title: Trump Accounts app launches — here's how to get started
item.description: Families can now download a Trump Accounts app to track the new investment accounts, which offer a $1,000 pilot program contribution for eligible children.

item.title: More workers are raiding their 401(k)s as average balances fall, Fidelity says
item.description: Retirement account balances sank at the start of 2026 amid market swings, according to Fidelity. At the same time, more savers tapped their accounts for cash.

item.title: Best Buy beats on top and bottom lines as retailer aims to reinvigorate sales
item.description: Best Buy reported better-than-expected earnings on Thursday as the company works toward turning around its sales slump.

item.title: Ferrari CEO defends $640,000 price tag for its first fully electric car
item.description: Ferrari CEO Benedetto Vigna on Thursday said the cost of the manufacturer's new Luce model was a fair price to pay for innovation.

item.title: Fertitta-owned firm to buy Caesars Entertainment in nearly $18 billion leisure push
This chip stock has more than tripled in the past year. Analysts say buy more after latest earnings
item.description: The semiconductor company reported fiscal 2027 first-quarter earnings and revenue that beat consensus estimates.

item.title: Rally in chip stocks becomes the most hated in history. Here's the data
item.description: The rally in semiconductor stocks is so incredible, traders can't help but bet against it.

item.title: This AI stock is surging after an ex-OpenAI employee's fund disclosed a stake. Here's why
item.description: Dutch cloud provider Nebius popped in premarket trading after an ex-OpenAI employee's fund took a sizeable stake in the firm,

item.title: Mistral to explore designing own chips, CEO says, as it ramps up infrastructure build
item.description: Mistral's semiconductor ambitions underscore the French startup's bid to control more of its infrastructure as it competes with OpenAI and Anthropic.

item.title: Warren: State Department didn't seek TRANSCOM aid in evacuating Americans from Middle East
item.description: Democrats have been critical of the Trump administration's handling of Americans stuck in the region after the start of the Iran war.

item.title: Here's why Dick's Sporting Goods latest quarter signals a bright spot for Nike
item.description: We took some solace in the Dick's quarter as it relates to beleaguered Nike, a stock on borrowed time in the portfolio.

item.title: Driving instead of flying? Here's the best car insurance for road trips
item.description: If you're skipping the airport for the interstate, these insurers could help with unexpected road trip setbacks.

item.title: Energy inflation has been more persistent than expected, Fed's Goolsbee tells CNBC
item.description: While oil prices have recently fallen on news that a peace deal between the U.S. and Iran could come, prices are still significantly higher than before the war.

item.title: Salesforce beats on earnings and revenue but full-year guidance comes in light
item.description: Salesforce has been hammered by investors on concern that artificial intelligence models and services will disrupt some traditional software products.

item.title: Why Ferrari’s rocky EV launch may not be the disaster investors fear
item.description: Ferrari has endured a firestorm of criticism following the launch of its first fully electric vehicle.

item.title: Ousted BP chair Albert Manifold rejects ‘lies’ over his conduct
item.description: BP's board on Tuesday announced the removal of Manifold due to "serious concerns" relating to governance standards, oversight and conduct.

item.title: Google employee charged with $1M Polymarket insider trading bet on search term
item.description: The complaint from the Southern District of New York comes just over a month after another insider trading case on Polymarket.

item.title: Fed’s Kashkari tells CNBC that inflation fight takes priority as labor market is 'in decent shape'
item.description: The Minneapolis Fed President warned that persistently high inflation risks becoming embedded in consumer expectations, potentially forcing tougher policy action later.

item.title: Dell wins a $9.7 billion Pentagon software deal after cozying up to Trump
item.description: The purchase comes after Dell spent considerable time courting the White House and after President Trump urged purchases of the company's computers.

item.title: Mark Zuckerberg says a Meta cloud computing business 'definitely on the table'
item.description: Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg said his company could enter the cloud computing market if it overspends on data centers and has excess capacity.
